headline: KDP Q1 Deep Dive: Transformation Efforts, JDE Peet's Integration, and Segment Divergence
summary: Beverage company Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 9.4% year on year to $3.98 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.39 per share was 4.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper: Good Dividend And Excellent Growth Prospects At A Bargain Price
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper is about to spin off both its beverage and coffee entities. Read how this move could unlock opportunities for investors.

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Is Up 9.6% After Mixed Q1 2026 And JDE Peet’s Deal Completion
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. has reported past first-quarter 2026 results with sales rising to US$3,976 million from US$3,635 million a year earlier, while net income fell to US$270 million from US$517 million and basic and diluted EPS from continuing operations declined to US$0.20 from US$0.38. The quarter also marked the completion of the JDE Peet’s acquisition and reaffirmed 2026 guidance, highlighting how the refreshed coffee portfolio and stronger U.S. Refreshment Beverages momentum are...

headline: While Everyone Sold KDP, Bill Nygren Bought. Now the Rally Is Here.
summary: Bill Nygren’s Oakmark Select Fund disclosed an increased position in Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ: KDP) in its fourth-quarter 2025 commentary, buying the beverage giant while the stock drifted through the mid-$20s and most of Wall Street walked away. On April 23, 2026, shares jumped 7.5% after a first-quarter earnings beat, a belated nod to a ... While Everyone Sold KDP, Bill Nygren Bought. Now the Rally Is Here.

headline: Why Is Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Stock Soaring Today
